Kesh Barlow counts their pay twice on payday and sends most of it somewhere they don't name.
You wait a day in port. The dockworkers play cards. The meter runs.

You wait a day in port. The dockworkers play cards. The meter runs.
⚠ STARVING — buy food, fast.
The pantry is empty. Everyone's rationing air-paste and resentment.
Odile Vance runs a hand along the console. "She's got a pull to port on cold starts. I've stopped fighting it."
You wait a day in port. The dockworkers play cards. The meter runs.
⚠ STARVING — buy food, fast.
You wait a day in port. The dockworkers play cards. The meter runs.
⚠ STARVING — buy food, fast.
Kesh Barlow is too weak to work and jumps ship at the first chance. Starvation is bad for retention.
